title: Fresh Graphics and redesigning for VC Website
brief: I run a venture-capital firm and the site that represents us needs a visual lift. The structure, copy and flow all work, but the graphics feel dated. I’d like a designer to introduce new, high-quality visuals that match our brand and instantly communicate credibility. Here’s what I need: • A cohesive set of web-ready graphics for the key sections I’ll outline (approximately 8–10 assets, including a new hero image, section illustrations and a few subtle icons). • Files delivered in optimised PNG/SVG plus editable source files—Figma, PSD or AI are all fine. • Brief implementation notes or lightweight CSS so my developer can slot everything in without guesswork. Acceptance criteria: • Style aligns with the colour palette and logo in the brand guide I’ll share once we start. • Retina-ready, compressed for speedy load times (under 200 KB for hero visuals, under 50 KB for icons). • Scales cleanly across common breakpoints—desktop, tablet and mobile. If you’ve refreshed finance or tech sites before, point me to a couple of examples. I’m excited to see how your design expertise can make the site look as forward-thinking as the companies we back.
